## addAttachmentDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `attach` command.

Drives CLI subcommand `attach` and MCP tool `attachment_add`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
addAttachmentDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    taskId: string;
    filePath: string;
}, AddAttachmentResult, z.ZodObject<{
    taskId: z.ZodString;
    filePath: z.ZodString;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    taskId: string;
    filePath: string;
}, {
    taskId: string;
    filePath: string;
}>>
```
